hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */backend/.env|backend/.env|*/backend/.env.production|backend/.env.production|*/deploy.env|deploy.env) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: this file holds real local secrets (backend/.env, backend/.env.production, or deploy.env). Edit it manually outside Claude Code."}}' ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *backend/*.py) pre-commit run ruff --files "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; pre-commit run ruff-format --files "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *frontend/src/*.ts|*frontend/src/*.tsx) (cd frontend && npx eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1) ;; esac; exit 0; }
